cast.name: Hinnerk Schönemann
cast.character: German Soldier in No Man's Land

plot outline: On the outbreak of the First World War, Albert's beloved horse 'Joey' is sold to the Cavalry by his Father. After being sent to France, in a bid to survive, Joey has an unexpected journey across war torn Europe. Albert enlists in the British Army, and is wounded during the Battle of the Somme. Whilst recovering in Hospital, he learns of a Horse, found in no mans land.
title: War Horse

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Argentina
Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
